meta.source: NOAA CDO + EPA EJI + CWCB + Colorado State Forest Service
meta.note: Climate hazard and EJ index data for PMA infrastructure resilience scoring. Rebuild via scripts/market/fetch_climate_and_environment.py

drought_risk.description: Colorado faces persistent drought; Western Slope most affected

wildfire_risk.description: Increasing wildfire risk across Front Range foothills and mountain counties
wildfire_risk.source: Colorado State Forest Service — 2024 State Forest Report

flooding_risk.description: Flash flooding along Front Range drainages and river corridors

hail_risk.description: Colorado Front Range in 'hail alley'; significant insurance implications

extreme_heat.description: Denver metro 30–40 days >90°F annually; increasing trend

freeze_thaw.description: High altitude counties experience >150 freeze-thaw cycles per year

noaa_summary.coverage_note: Full NOAA climate normals available via CDO Web Services API; NOAA_API_KEY (free) improves rate limits
